nodes.title: This Anim Modifier calculates the change in root rotation and is used to create the "RotationAmount" curves for the turn in place animations. Each curve value represents the change in rotation from the current and next frame, so it can be applied to the actors rotation to mimic root motion.
nodes.comment: This Anim Modifier calculates the change in root rotation and is used to create the "RotationAmount" curves for the turn in place animations. Each curve value represents the change in rotation from the current and next frame, so it can be applied to the actors rotation to mimic root motion.
